echo
----
----
zero:

  [status] admitting all
  [health] compaction score 0.000, write-stalls 12
  [L0] in +0 B (writes 0 B, ingests 0 B), out -0 B (net 0 B)
real-numbers:

  [status] throttling all at 7.7 MiB/s (elastic 0 B/s) due to L0 growth
  [health] compaction score 2.700[L0-overload], write-stalls 2
  [L0] in +577 MiB (writes 0 B, ingests 0 B), out -77 MiB (net 500 MiB)
